creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to O. Hartmann from comment #20)
Fails on FreeBSD 13.4:

cd /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/pocl/work/.build/lib/llvmopencl && /usr/local/libexec/ccache/c++ -DCL_HPP_TARGET_OPENCL_VERSION=300 -DCL_TARGET_OPENCL_VERSION=300 -DCL_USE_DEPRECATED_OPENCL_1_0_APIS -DCL_USE_DEPRECATED_OPENCL_1_1_APIS -DCL_US
E_DEPRECATED_OPENCL_1_2_APIS -DCL_USE_DEPRECATED_OPENCL_2_0_APIS -DCL_USE_DEPRECATED_OPENCL_2_1_APIS -DCL_USE_DEPRECATED_OPENCL_2_2_APIS -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/pocl/work/.build -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/pocl/work/pocl-6.0/include -I/w
rkdirs/usr/ports/lang/pocl/work/pocl-6.0/include/hpp -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/pocl/work/pocl-6.0/lib/llvmopencl/../CL -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/pocl/work/pocl-6.0/lib/llvmopencl/../CL/devices -O2 -pipe -fstack-protector-strong -isystem
/usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing  -isystem /usr/local/include -I/usr/local/llvm18/include -std=c++17   -fno-exceptions -funwind-tables -D__STDC_CONSTANT_MACROS -D__STDC_FORMAT_MACROS -D__STDC_LIMIT_MACROS -O2 -pipe -fstack-protect
or-strong -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing  -isystem /usr/local/include  -DNDEBUG -flto=thin -fPIC -Wno-ignored-attributes -fvisibility=hidden -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -MD -MT lib/llvmopencl/CMakeFiles/llvmpasses.dir/C
anonicalizeBarriers.cc.o -MF CMakeFiles/llvmpasses.dir/CanonicalizeBarriers.cc.o.d -o CMakeFiles/llvmpasses.dir/CanonicalizeBarriers.cc.o -c /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/pocl/work/pocl-6.0/lib/llvmopencl/CanonicalizeBarriers.cc
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/pocl/work/pocl-6.0/lib/CL/devices/cpuinfo.c:179:8: error: call to undeclared function 'sysctlbyname'; ISO C99 and later do not support implicit function declarations [-Werror,-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
  179 |   if (!sysctlbyname(mib1, NULL, &size, NULL, 0) &&
      |        ^
1 error generated.
gmake[2]: *** [lib/CL/devices/CMakeFiles/pocl-devices.dir/build.make:180: lib/CL/devices/CMakeFiles/pocl-devices.dir/cpuinfo.c.o] Error 1
gmake[2]: Leaving directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/pocl/work/.build'
gmake[1]: *** [CMakeFiles/Makefile2:1427: lib/CL/devices/CMakeFiles/pocl-devices.dir/all] Error 2
gmake[1]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....


Could you please check it?
